properties.displayName: Enforce Storage Account Public Access and Deploy Allowed IPs
nonComplianceMessages: Storage account's public access configuration do not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Public access should be disabled and Vnet integration should be enabled. Please reference this guide for the Vnet integration process and requirements https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/devops-tech-enablement/ghec/Actions/gitHubHostedRunners/
